title: Weterton Feeds 20kg Sunflower Hearts for Wild Birds- Premium Grade
description: Product description Sunflower hearts for wild birds are essentially the shelled, meaty kernel found within the sunflower seed. They are a popular choice among bird enthusiasts and bird feeders due to their convenience and high nutritional value. Here's a detailed description: Appearance: Sunflower hearts are small, oval-shaped seeds with a flattened profile. They are typically light gray or ivory in color, with a smooth texture. Nutritional Value: Sunflower hearts are rich in essential nutrients that are beneficial for wild birds. They provide a good source of protein, healthy fats, fiber, vitamins (especially vitamin E), and minerals (such as magnesium, selenium, and copper). These nutrients are crucial for maintaining the health and vitality of wild bird populations. Convenience: Unlike whole sunflower seeds, sunflower hearts are already shelled, making them easier for birds to consume. This convenience factor reduces waste and mess around bird feeders, as there are no discarded shells left behind. Attractiveness to Birds: Sunflower hearts are highly attractive to a wide variety of wild bird species. Birds such as finches, chickadees, sparrows, nuthatches, and cardinals are particularly fond of sunflower hearts. Their meaty texture and rich nutritional content make them an irresistible food source for many birds. Versatility: Sunflower hearts can be used in various types of bird feeders, including tube feeders, hopper feeders, platform feeders, and ground feeders. They can also be mixed with other bird foods, such as millet, cracked corn, and peanuts, to create custom bird seed blends tailored to specific bird species' preferences. Year-Round Feeding: Sunflower hearts are suitable for year-round feeding, providing birds with essential energy and nutrients during all seasons, including harsh winter months when natural food sources may be scarce. Overall, sunflower hearts for wild birds are a nutritious and convenient food option that helps support bird populations while attracting a diverse array of species to bird feeders. Indications All Life Stages, All Breeds Ingredients Sunflower hearts Directions Keep Dry See more
